title: digitaria royleana
intro: Digitaria royleana, also known as Digitaria, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Digitaria royleana include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Digitaria royleana typically involve drying the plant, grinding it into a powder, and using it to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
